files.patch:
@@ -57,11 +57,18 @@ jobs:
         uses: tree-sitter/parser-test-action@v2
         with:
           test-rust: true
-          test-node: true
-          node-version: 20
+          test-node: false
           test-python: true
           test-go: true
           test-swift: false
+      - name: Set up Node.js

+          node-version: 20
+      - name: Install Node dependencies

+      - name: Run Node binding tests

       - name: Parse sample files
         uses: tree-sitter/parse-action@v4
         id: parse-files
